text:
net graduation_cadence "Cadence graduation fragment"

(tick_latch) -tick_latch-> [on_tick] -tick_latch-> (tick_latch)
(clock) -clock->? [on_tick]
[on_tick] -refresh_due-> (refresh_due_out)

(refresh_due_out) port output refresh_due

[on_tick] handler "on_tick@cadence"

[on_tick] timer clock (clock) cel "clock.now >= latch.fired_at + latch.cadence_s"
[on_tick] timer bind latch (tick_latch)

marking initial (tick_latch) <- $token_0
marking initial (clock) <- $token_1
$token_0: tick_latch {"cadence_s":300,"fired_at":0}
$token_1: clock {"now":0}
